reasoning: The key limiter is lactate clearance, as evidenced by the 9.3% drop from 5-min to 20-min power. The last ride showcased a strong aerobic effort but lacked higher intensity work. This workout will specifically target improving your aerobic base and fatigue resistance, critical for maintaining target wattage on the challenging Alpine Loop climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 x 6 min over-unders: 3 mins at 242W, 3 mins at 218W; 2 min recoveries at 201W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
